case_title: DERETHIK, ALYCE et al VS BISTRO LUNEL/RED HOT RESTAURANT INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DERETHIK, ALYCE GOURMET FRANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BISTRO LUNEL/RED HOT RESTAURANT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BISTRO LUNEL/RED HOT RESTAURANT INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DERETHIK, ALYCE GOURMET FRANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BISTRO LUNEL/RED HOT RESTAURANT INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-05-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF NOV-02-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
